description_long: This is a modern, cubic bungalow with a flat roof and clean, minimalist lines. The exterior is predominantly white with large glass sliding doors opening onto a wooden deck that surrounds a rectangular swimming pool. The property features landscaped elements, including palm trees, a flowering tree, and a small deciduous tree, enhancing its contemporary aesthetic. A driveway with a parked car leads to the main entrance, which is subtly integrated into the facade. The rear of the bungalow has expansive windows and outdoor seating, providing a seamless indoor-outdoor living experience. The overall design emphasizes open space, natural light, and a strong connection to the outdoor environment.
description: A modern white bungalow with a flat roof, large glass doors, a wooden deck, and a pool, surrounded by landscaped trees and a driveway with a car.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with a car, and the pool area with palm trees and deck.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid white facade, minimal windows, and the driveway extending along the side.
description_view_2: Rear-side view displaying the pool, deck, and more of the landscaped trees, with the back of the bungalow visible.
description_view_3: Back view featuring large glass doors, outdoor seating, the pool, and lush landscaping with multiple trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large glass doors and scattered windows
